description: scaffold a Jupyter notebook (experiment or tutorial) from a bundled template (local-only)
rules: read/local-only — never pushes to a remote, installs, or mutates a live service
loads a vendored .ipynb template (experiment or tutorial), sets the first markdown title cell
writes a single notebook file under record_store
core uses only the Python standard library
usage: Set KIND (experiment|tutorial) and TITLE. Optionally set OUT (filename under record_store). Output: <OUT or notebook.ipynb>.
limitation: Local-only: writes one .ipynb file; it does not execute the notebook. KIND must be 'experiment' or 'tutorial' (defaults to experiment).
